_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 22:33 UTC tick — 1 news_flash (Pakistan-leads-talks angle, non-actionable) + 2 bar_close (noise). Live broker 22:32 UTC: WTI 92.94 (+639p vs 16:53 86.55, +3.07% on day, day high 93.39 — broke 90 cleanly on Hormuz blockade re-rating), GOLD 4733.30 (-19.5p vs 4752.76, day high 4772 REJECTED confirming spike-fade pattern, now 41.7p below 4775), USDJPY 159.48 (+53p closer to 160, crude bid supporting USD), AUDUSD 0.71596 (+12.8p drift; BTC +4.14% risk-on persisting). 3 web searches (gold/JPY/Iran) — narrative unchanged: Trump indefinite extension + 3-ship Hormuz seizure/attack + Vance trip on hold + Iran no-final-decision. All 3 prior alerts MODIFY (price refs stale by 5.5h + new context). 1 ADD: oil_crude_retest_90_buy (broken-resistance-becomes-support setup after +3% breakout). 9 structure_watch KEEP. 8 news_queries KEEP. Counterfactual: still no horizon evaluations on active alerts (avg_pips=None) so no REMOVE-by-data trigger.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 22:33 UTC — buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on Iran-escalation spike. Live 22:32 UTC 0.71596 (+12.8p vs 12:42 0.71468, 88.6p above trigger — drifted further away). Crude +3% without gold joining = oil-specific supply story not broad escalation; BTC +4.14% day confirms risk-ON persists, weakening AUD-spike-to-support thesis. Setup requires a fresh shock rung (US casualties, formal Iran walkout, Hormuz reopen denial) to re-energize. SL 0.703, TP 0.7187 on 0.707 rejection wick + risk-off confirm. Conv 3 currently, skip naked breaks.
level_alerts.proximity: 88.6p above 0.707 buy zone (live 22:32 UTC 0.71596). Drifted +12.8p further away since 12:42. BTC+4.14% + risk-on persists.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 22:33 UTC — sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade. Live 22:32 UTC 159.48 (+53p vs 15:50 158.95, now 52p below 160 — moved CLOSER on crude-bid-USD dynamic). Day range 159.10-159.52. Katayama-Bessent 'bold action' language intact per Apr 16 — MoF pain threshold 158 per FXEmpire/MUFG. If 160 tags: short on rejection wick + verbal-intervention/rate-check confirm; skip naked breaks (prior 158.27 overnight low shows JPY bid available on oil fade/diplomacy). SL 160.50, TP 158.50 R:R ~3:1. Conv 4 on clean tag+rejection.
level_alerts.proximity: 52p below 160.00 intervention red line (live 22:32 UTC 159.48). Moved +53p closer since 15:50 on crude-driven USD bid.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 22:33 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout. Live 22:32 UTC 4733.30 (-19.5p vs 15:55 4752.76, now 41.7p below trigger). Day range 4715.44-4772.24 — 4772 HIGH CONFIRMED REJECTED (validated the spike-fade caution from prior note). Crude ripping +3% but gold ROLLING OFF = traders pricing Hormuz as oil-supply story not capital-flight escalation; gold-safehaven bid weakening. Thesis still valid on a NEXT escalation rung (US casualties, formal walkout, Hormuz reopen refusal hardening) but conv now 3 (was 4 at session high). If 4775 tagged: require M15 BOS up + no rejection wick (two rejects at this zone today). Aggressive LIMIT 4735-4740 questionable now — gold already broke back below 4750 vs seizure floor thesis. SL 4730, TP1 4810, TP2 4850.
level_alerts.proximity: 41.7p below 4775 buy trigger (ref 22:32 UTC 4733.30 bid). Rolled off -19.5p vs 15:55; 4772 session high REJECTED.

level_alerts.note: ADDED 22:33 UTC — buy WTI 90.30 retest of broken 90 resistance as new support. Live 22:32 UTC 92.94 (+639p vs 16:53 86.55, +3.07% on day, day high 93.39). Clean break above 90 on Hormuz blockade re-rating (IRGC seized 2 ships + fired on 3rd Apr 22) — gold NOT joining the move confirms this is oil-supply specific. Anticipation logic: pullback to 90.30 with M15 reject wick + hold = buy. If price accepts below 90 (closes M15 < 89.80) thesis dead. SL 89.20 (90p risk), TP1 93.50 (daily high break, ~320p), TP2 95.00 (~470p). Conv 4: fresh structural break + clear invalidation. Skip if price just slices through 90 without any reaction (= new supply or Hormuz-reopen news).
level_alerts.proximity: 264p above 90.30 retest zone (live 22:32 UTC 92.94). Broke 90 cleanly +3% on day; needs pullback.
